entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume Cajanus cajan

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility where the pigeonpea core collection was developed

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of pigeonpea germplasm consisting of 1,290 accessions from 53 countries

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The timing of crop development, categorized into extra early, early, medium, and late groups

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental condition during the 2004 evaluation period

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The observable physical variation among the pigeonpea accessions

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of first-order branches on the plant

entities.name: SECONDARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of second-order branches on the plant

entities.name: TERTIARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of third-order branches on the plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF RACEMES
entities.description: The count of flower clusters per plant

entities.name: POD BEARING LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the branch that bears pods

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total number of pods produced by a single plant

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENT
entities.description: The percentage of seed weight relative to total pod weight

entities.name: PLOT SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed harvested from a specific plot area

entities.name: LEAF SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the leaves

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: POD LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the individual pods

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: The number of seeds contained within a single pod

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: VEGETABLE PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A type of pigeonpea used as a vegetable

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A dimensionality reduction method used to analyze multivariate polymorphism

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify important traits explaining polymorphism

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The variation across multiple traits simultaneously

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A mathematical measure used to quantify phenotypic diversity
